title: Extruding and Forming Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Synthetic and Glass Fibers
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines that extrude and form continuous filaments from synthetic materials, such as liquid polymer, rayon, and fiberglass.

tasks.text: Set up, operate, or tend machines that extrude and form filaments from synthetic materials such as rayon, fiberglass, or liquid polymers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Press buttons to stop machines when processes are complete or when malfunctions are detected.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify other workers of defects, and direct them to adjust extruding and forming machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe machine operations, control boards, and gauges to detect malfunctions such as clogged bushings and defective binder applicators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load materials into extruding and forming machines, using hand tools, and adjust feed mechanisms to set feed rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move controls to activate and adjust extruding and forming machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain extruding and forming machines, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe flow of finish across finish rollers, and turn valves to adjust flow to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove polymer deposits from spinnerettes and equipment, using silicone spray, brass chisels, and bronze-wool pads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Press metering-pump buttons and turn valves to stop flow of polymers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record operational data on tags, and attach tags to machines.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Start metering pumps and observe operation of machines and equipment to ensure continuous flow of filaments extruded through spinnerettes and to detect processing defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove excess, entangled, or completed filaments from machines, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wipe finish rollers with cloths and wash finish trays with water when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lower pans inside cabinets to catch molten filaments until flow of polymer through packs has stopped.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open cabinet doors to cut multifilament threadlines away from guides, using scissors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
